calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Robert Williams, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Tammy St. Germain.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day Notice-------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Tammy St. Germain as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 2791 Sixteenth St., #71, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $2,349.74
Costs $195.00, for a total of $2,544.74
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
LAURA CHIERA, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANT TAMMY GERMAIN WHO IS NOT PRESENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS

JUDGE PRO TEM: SANDY MCNABB; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD/SHERIFE HUSENY; NOT REPORTED (218)
